<?php namespace Barryvdh\Debugbar\Middleware; use Closure; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Barryvdh\Debugbar\LaravelDebugbar; class DebugbarEnabled { /** * The DebugBar instance * * @var LaravelDebugbar */ protected $debugbar; /** * Create a new middleware instance. * * @param LaravelDebugbar $debugbar */ public function __construct(LaravelDebugbar $debugbar) { $this->debugbar = $debugbar; } /** * Handle an incoming request. * * @param Request $request * @param Closure $next * @return mixed */ public function handle($request, Closure $next) { if (!$this->debugbar->isEnabled()) { abort(404); } return $next($request); } }
